title: User Profile Schema
description: Unified user profile for initialization and stateful behavioral adaptation (Commit 7).

career_phase.description: Current career phase of the user.

weight_profiles.description: Current weightings for each decision dimension.

risk_tolerance.description: User's tolerance for risk in career decisions.

ambiguity_tolerance.description: User's tolerance for ambiguous or undefined roles.

compensation_weight.description: Relative importance of compensation in evaluations.

structure_preference.description: Preference for defined scope, reporting lines, and structured environments.

decision_fatigue_index.description: Approximate measure of the user's susceptibility to cognitive fatigue.

interaction_history.description: Chronological log of user interactions with the LLM and engine outputs.

prompt.description: Prompt submitted by the user to the engine/LLM.

engine_output.description: Structured output produced by the evaluation engine for this prompt.

user_feedback.description: Optional user reflection, comment, or reaction to the engine's output.
